title: spawner egg recipes
description: add spawner and almost all spawn egg recipe
body:
This datapack adds recipes for spawners and almost all spawn eggs. You can use these items to capture or farm nearly every creature. The recipes are unlocked once you obtain the required items. Note: Recipes for villagers, Wither, and Ender Dragon egg are not included.

![spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5e6e439b3232be0b39bff51a2ed2b0907f07166.png)
![eggs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72e82673e6924b2124736f4b59bc3c8b74f6dec4.png)
